taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data analytics, Healthcare datasets, Claims data, Electronic health records, Data management
skill_match_scores: Data analytics:1.0, Healthcare datasets:0.0, Claims data:0.0, Electronic health records:0.0, Data management:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong project management and data analytic skills, Experience with large healthcare datasets (claims, electronic health records, etc.), Close attention to detail and timelines, Discretion in handling sensitive information, Strong interpersonal skills, Ability to analyze complex and high-dimensional clinical and operational data for dependencies, patterns, outliers, inaccuracies, and validity, Knowledge of statistics, machine learning, programming, data modeling, simulation, and/or advanced mathematics, Ability to recognize patterns, identify opportunities, pose business questions, and make valuable discoveries, Ability to design and evaluate optimal data-driven metrics, Ability to design, develop, and evaluate predictive models and advanced algorithms
core_responsibilities: Analyze complex and high-dimensional clinical and operational data for dependencies, patterns, outliers, inaccuracies, and validity, Apply knowledge of statistics, machine learning, programming, data modeling, simulation, and/or advanced mathematics to recognize patterns, identify opportunities, pose business questions, and make valuable discoveries, Contribute to the design and evaluation of optimal data-driven metrics (such as physician/facility performance criteria, bottleneck metrics, productivity limits, processing delay/error reports, etc.), Use a flexible, analytical approach to design, develop, and evaluate predictive models and advanced algorithms that lead to optimal value extraction from the data, Generate and test hypotheses and analyze and interpret the results
job_summary: Mass General Brigham is a not-for-profit organization that supports patient care, research, teaching, and community service. The Obstetrics and Gynecology Department at Massachusetts General Hospital is seeking a Data Scientist to provide analytic and project management support for reproductive health research initiatives, involving data management, statistical analysis, and report preparation.
